description: Per-candidate status tracker through the Minderoo 50-to-7 workshop funnel. Status values progress from candidate (in pool, no outreach) through shortlisted_s1 (narrowed in Session 1), outreach_sent, interested (community signalled back), confirmed_anchor. Terminal states: declined, withdrew, archived. Updated via git commits to this file; dashboard shows live funnel + per-state drill-down.

status_legend.candidate: In the 235-candidate pool, no outreach yet
status_legend.shortlisted_s1: Narrowed from 235 to ~25 in Workshop Session 1 with Minderoo
status_legend.outreach_sent: ACT has contacted community leadership; response pending
status_legend.interested: Community has signalled interest; full consent flow in progress
status_legend.confirmed_anchor: Community confirmed, verbal approval captured, anchor relationship formal
status_legend.declined: Community declined (respectfully recorded; do not re-approach for this cycle)
status_legend.withdrew: Community initially engaged then withdrew (preserve record + reason)
status_legend.archived: Out of scope for this cycle (not rejected, just parked for future)

QLD.note: PICC, MMEIC, BG Fit all confirmed; three QLD anchors is by circumstance not design — workshop may consolidate

WA.note: Introduction via Hailey (UWA criminology) in progress

TAS.note: Thinnest pool; research via JRI/Diagrama network

ACT.note: Gugan Gulwan Youth Aboriginal Corporation in scored pool (33 years); candidate for outreach

approvers: Kristy Bloomfield (co-director, Traditional Owner of Mparntwe)
16cadc21-083d-4d5e-8b9f-7dc6dca33b38.notes: Foundational anchor. 95% diversion. Host of 17 April 2026 Judges on Country trip (completed). 9 ALMA interventions scored. 6 EL v2 stories flowing into wiki.

18fc2705-463c-4b27-8dbd-0ca79c640582.notes: $29M annual turnover. 208 FTE. 21 ALMA interventions (11 youth-justice). Scoring pipeline fixed 2026-04-20 — PICC now ranks 5.

approvers: MMEIC Elders-in-Council (to be named in record before print)
e7267f3a-e466-416f-aebf-d6bf52c7dde7.consent_mode: relationship (elder council has given permission for inclusion)
e7267f3a-e466-416f-aebf-d6bf52c7dde7.notes: Quandamooka Country. Founded 1994 (32 years). 3 ALMA draft interventions authored 2026-04-20 (review_status=Community Review); pending formal MMEIC elder review on intervention wording before promotion to Published.

8851899b-2bef-4f90-b0a4-a5accee86296.org_name: Brodie Germaine Fitness Aboriginal Corporation (BG Fit)
8851899b-2bef-4f90-b0a4-a5accee86296.notes: Mount Isa. ORIC ICN 10049. 3 ALMA draft interventions authored 2026-04-20 (review_status=Community Review); 12 wiki stories flowing; Jay, Doomadgee, Mount Isa Bush Camp per-story elder extensions approved.

9ddcbdc9-4b59-4610-aaeb-6180538ca816.org_name: Mounty Aboriginal Youth & Community Services (Mounty Yarns)
9ddcbdc9-4b59-4610-aaeb-6180538ca816.notes: Mt Druitt, NSW. 13 storytellers in EL v2 (9 young people). 'In Their Own Words' compilation flowing to wiki. 2 ALMA draft interventions authored 2026-04-20.

actions: Expanded candidate pool from 50 to 235 (20+ per state/territory)
Authored MMEIC + BG Fit + Mounty Yarns ALMA draft interventions (pending leadership review)
session_log.outcome: 5/5 anchors confirmed + healthy. Ready for Minderoo workshop.

session_1_preparation: Share dashboard URL + candidate shortlist with Lucy Stronach before Session 1
Prepare a recommended shortlist of ~25 candidates to walk through together (mix of scored + youth-focused + research)
Identify states where Minderoo has existing relationships — flag for early narrowing
session_1_decisions_to_make: Confirm 'one per state + territory' vs other coverage principle
Identify communities Minderoo has existing relationships with (pre-warmed)
between_session_actions_for_act: Reach out to each of the ~25 candidates (status: outreach_sent)
Receive responses — move to interested / declined / no-response
